text_excerpt: Campaigns | Alberto Costa Skip to main content Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Main navigation About Alberto News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Apply now: Alberto Costa's Westminster Summer School (16-19 year olds) Surgeries Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Campaigns Cut my bills Labour promised to cut your energy bills by £300, but they’ve gone up by almost £200. Urge Labour to back our Cheap Power Plan which would cut everyone’s... Scrap Stamp Duty on main homes Sign our petition urging Labour to scrap Stamp Duty on main homes. Land and Property Management Companies - Have Your Say Many residents who own their property as both leaseholders and freeholders, particularly in a new-build estates, have raised issues with their property... Stop the Family Farm Tax Labour have broken their promise to British farmers with the Family Farm Tax. Labour's Family Farm Tax will stop farms being passed to the next generation... Petition: Save Leicester's New Hospitals Funding was announced by the Conservative Government in May 2023 for a new hospital at the Leicester Royal Infirmary for women's and ICU services, a midwifery... South Leicestershire local quality of life survey - share your views with Alberto Costa I am passionate about our villages and want to ensure that rural South Leicestershire remains a wonderful place to live. My local priorities already include... Alberto invites views on local transport investment Complete the survey below to have your say on where you would like to see investment in local infrastructure. My priorities for South Leicestershire Boosting our healthy Leicestershire economy still further by promoting our local shops, post offices and public houses in our villages and towns as community assets and partnering with businesses to offer more apprenticeships to younger people. Supporting sustainable development As a Conservative MP I do of course always support the creation of further employment and investment in both the local and national economy, however it is important that this development comes in a sustainable manner; not at the expense of our local environment and local infrastructure. Fairer funding for Leicestershire I am firmly committed to working with Leicestershire County Council to deliver fairer funding for Leicestershire. Leicestershire has, for a number of years, had a low level of spend relative to other local authorities, which has created pressures on spending and budgetary savings. Supporting our local businesses I am immensely proud that South Leicestershire is a home to a wonderful array of small, independent businesses and SMEs as well as other larger organisations such as Next, Everards and Britvic. Delivering a better future Without a doubt, one of the most enjoyable aspects of my role as Member of Parliament is visiting the fantastic businesses, schools and charities we have in South Leicestershire.
